Controls.Text: [[基础属性]] [物理防御：{{Item.Attribute.MinPhysicalDefense}}-{{Item.Attribute.MaxPhysicalDefense}}] [魔法防御：{{Item.Attribute.MinMagicDefense}}-{{Item.Attribute.MaxMagicDefense}}] [物理攻击：{{Item.Attribute.MinPhysicalAttack}}-{{Item.Attribute.MaxPhysicalAttack}}] [魔法攻击：{{Item.Attribute.MinMagicAttack}}-{{Item.Attribute.MaxMagicAttack}}] [道术攻击：{{Item.Attribute.MinTaoismAttack}}-{{Item.Attribute.MaxTaoismAttack}}] [物理穿透：{{Item.Attribute.PhysicalPenetration}}%] [魔法穿透：{{Item.Attribute.MagicPenetration}}%] [生命：{{Item.Attribute.MaxHealth}}] [魔法：{{Item.Attribute.MaxMana}}]

[[属性]] [力量：{{Item.Attribute.Strength}}] [敏捷：{{Item.Attribute.Agility}}] [智力：{{Item.Attribute.Intelligence}}] [精神：{{Item.Attribute.Spirit}}] [体质：{{Item.Attribute.Constitution}}] [负重：{{Item.Attribute.MaxCarryWeight}}]
